Select the encryption method for operati.notes: Maps to BitLocker CSP EncryptionMethod for OS drives. Prefer XTS-AES-256 where supported.
Select the encryption method for operati.property_path: settings[name=Select the encryption method for operating system drives].value

Require Device Encryption.notes: Enables device encryption; may map to Windows Device Encryption on some SKUs.

allowed_values: Do not allow startup PIN with TPM
Do not allow startup key with TPM
Configure TPM startup.notes: Controls TPM startup behaviour. Values are implementation-specific; validate per OS.

Allow BitLocker without a compatible TPM.notes: When false, BitLocker requires TPM; when true, allows use of startup key/password.
Allow BitLocker without a compatible TPM.property_path: settings[name=Allow BitLocker without a compatible TPM (requires a password or a startup key on a USB flash drive)].value

Choose how BitLocker-protected operating.notes: Maps recovery configuration; ensure backup to AAD when using Entra-joined devices.
Choose how BitLocker-protected operating.property_path: settings[name=Choose how BitLocker-protected operating system drives can be recovered].value

Configure encryption method for fixed da.notes: Encryption method for fixed (data) drives. Prefer XTS-AES-256 where supported.
Configure encryption method for fixed da.property_path: settings[name=Configure encryption method for fixed data drives].value

Configure encryption method for removabl.notes: Encryption method for removable (USB) drives. Consider user UX when enforcing stronger algorithms.
Configure encryption method for removabl.property_path: settings[name=Configure encryption method for removable data drives].value

Choose how BitLocker-protected fixed dat.notes: Recovery options for fixed data drives; prefer backing up to Entra ID for cloud-managed devices.
Choose how BitLocker-protected fixed dat.property_path: settings[name=Choose how BitLocker-protected fixed data drives can be recovered].value

Deny write access to removable drives no.notes: Blocks write access to removable drives that are not BitLocker-protected to prevent data exfiltration.
Deny write access to removable drives no.property_path: settings[name=Deny write access to removable drives not protected by BitLocker].value

Deny write access to fixed data drives n.notes: Blocks write access to fixed drives that are not BitLocker-protected; may impact legacy apps.
Deny write access to fixed data drives n.property_path: settings[name=Deny write access to fixed data drives not protected by BitLocker].value

Allow standard users to enable device en.notes: When true, non-administrative users can enable device encryption during setup or OOBE.
Allow standard users to enable device en.property_path: settings[name=Allow standard users to enable device encryption].value
